prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含原理科）最低位次分别为约12238、13380、14276、38189、42167名。2021–2023年传统理科位次在1.2万–1.4万之间缓慢后移；2024年江 西省实行新高考后，因专业组划分细化，最低分专业组（再选地理/不限）位次骤降至38189名，2025年进一步后移至42167名，近两年累计后移约2.8万名，降幅显著；该校在江西省物理类招生计划：2021年20人、2022年21人、2023年22人、2024年44人、2025年52人，呈持续扩招态势；2026年计划55人，较2025年增加3人，扩招约5 .8%，扩招有利于降低录取门槛，推动位次数字继续增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 云南大学为211工程、国家双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第71名，近年排名稳步提升（ 2021年83名→2026年71名），综合实力处于全国中上游水平；2025年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要因生命科学学院就业率仅4.63%引发舆论关注，可能对报考热 度产生一定抑制；抖音热度总排名第62位，评价为一般，短视频曝光量中等偏低，未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，民族学获评A+、生态学获评A、 统计学获评A-，3个学科进入A类，在同类211高校中学科实力突出，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域:
计算机类、电子信息类等工科专业社会热度持续较高 ，云南大学相关专业在江西省录取位次约1.1万–1.4万，远低于校最低位次；2026年江西省高考总人数约47.49万，较2025年略有增加，竞争基数扩大；云南大学位于昆明市，属西南地区，对江西省考生而言属于跨省就读，地域偏好一般；该校在江西省招生占比约3%–5%，属中等外省招生规模。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science Category) were approximately 12238, 13380, 14276, 38189, and 42167 respectively. From 2021 to 2023, traditional science rankings slowly shifted backward between 12,000 and 14,000. After Jiangxi Province implemented the new college entrance examination in 2024, due to the refinement of major group divisions, the ranking of the lowest-scoring major group (with re-selected Geography/No Restriction) plummeted to 38189, and further shifted backward to 42167 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 28,000 over the past two years, a significant decline. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangxi Province: 20 in 2021, 21 in 2022, 22 in 2023, 44 in 2024, and 52 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 55, an increase of 3 from 2025, an expansion of about 5.8%, which is conducive to lowering admission thresholds and pushing ranking numbers to continue increasing.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yunnan University is a Project 211 and national Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 71st, with a steady improvement in recent years (from 83rd in 2021 to 71st in 2026), placing it at the mid-to-upper level nationally. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly due to the employment rate of the School of Life Sciences being only 4.63%, which sparked public attention and may have suppressed application enthusiasm to some extent. Its overall Douyin popularity ranking is 62nd, rated as average, with medium-to-low short video exposure, and no significant record of enrollment gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Ethnology was rated A+, Ecology was rated A, and Statistics was rated A-, with three disciplines entering the A category, highlighting strong disciplinary strength among similar 211 universities, which has some appeal for applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
Engineering majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information continue to have high social popularity. The admission rankings for related majors at Yunnan University in Jiangxi Province are approximately 11,000 to 14,000, far below the university's minimum ranking. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Jiangxi Province college entrance examination is about 474,900, a slight increase from 2025, expanding the competition base. Yunnan University is located in Kunming, in the Southwest region, which is an out-of-province study destination for Jiangxi candidates, with average regional preference. The university's enrollment proportion in Jiangxi Province is about 3% to 5%, a moderate scale for out-of-province enrollment.
8. [Prediction Conclusion] Considering the significant backward shift in rankings after the new college entrance examination in 2024-2025, the continued slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+5.8%), the suppression of enthusiasm due to negative reputation, and the slight increase in the total number of candidates in Jiangxi Province, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 ranking of 42167. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 43827, with a range of 43327 to 44327.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 43327 to 44327, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application range, with Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information) as reach goals (referencing their historical rankings of about 11,000 to 14,000, far below the predicted range, making actual admission extremely difficult), and Tier 3 majors as safety choices. Rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 43,000) can appropriately increase the number of Tier 1 major applications.
